title: ACADIA's (ACAD) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Q2 2022 Results. ACADIA reported a second-quarter 2022 loss of 21 cents per share, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of 25 cents. Total revenues, comprising net sales of NUPLAZID, increased 17% year over year to $134.6 million in Q2 2022. Revenue surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $131 million. The better-than-expected results demonstrated solid execution despite challenging market conditions. The company expected NUPLAZID net sales in the range of $510-$540 million for 2022, which was revised downward from their earlier projection of $510-$560 million. This revision reflected some market headwinds but still represented growth from prior years.
